# Vendored UI dependencies

`van-1.6.0.nomodule.min.js` is VanJS 1.6.0's production non-module browser
build, downloaded from the project's jsDelivr release URL:

`https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/vanjs-org/van@1.6.0/public/van-1.6.0.nomodule.min.js`

It is licensed under MIT. The SHA-256 of the checked-in file is:

`e244d3764e4d0c93872e97d9af2d501da435a454154ba557778f268b3272e39d`

It is intentionally checked in and embedded by `src/ui_assets.nim`. Do not
replace it with a CDN reference: podlrc must remain offline and self-contained.

`van-x-0.6.3.nomodule.min.js` is VanX 0.6.3's production non-module browser
build from `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vanjs-ext@0.6.3/dist/van-x.nomodule.min.js`.
It is also MIT licensed and has SHA-256:

`e4b7de89bf2f84c22669ce7bcef592fb398d9dcf8b8a36f4562b8ac6354b1f2f`
